## Task

Write a confident, human, evidence-led draft for the target file.

## Tone

Write like a senior platform engineer presenting a world-class flagship portfolio.

Use:

- staged enterprise platform journey
- evidence-backed implementation
- production-style portfolio lab
- operationally validated pattern
- human-approved AI operations model
- platform evolution
- Release 3 direction

Avoid:

- this project does not claim
- only a lab
- limitations include
- weakness
- not production
- generic AI marketing phrases

## Output Rules

- Return final draft Markdown only.
- Do not edit files.
- Do not invent evidence.
- Use placeholders when links or diagrams are not finalized.
- Keep paragraphs concise.
- Use strong section headings.
